inputs.label: Total Repairs Per Period
inputs.businessContext: Total number of repair jobs completed in the period. Based on standard shop management KPIs.

inputs.label: Comeback Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of repairs that result in a comeback. Industry benchmark from ASA (Automotive Service Association) suggests 2-5% as acceptable.

inputs.label: Average Cost per Comeback
inputs.businessContext: Average direct cost (labor, parts, overhead) incurred per comeback. Based on shop accounting data.

inputs.label: Lost Customer Rate per Comeback
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of customers who do not return after a comeback. Industry studies show 15-30% churn.

inputs.label: Average Customer Lifetime Value
inputs.businessContext: Net present value of future profits from a typical customer. Based on CLV calculation methods.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts final cost for uncertainty.

thresholds.comebackRate > 5: Comeback rate exceeds industry benchmark of 5%.
thresholds.lostCustomerRate > 25: Lost customer rate exceeds typical range.

suggestedActions: Implement root cause analysis for comebacks
